[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110111 6
1 0011111 5
2 1010001 3
3 1111011 6
4 1110101 5
5 0011111 5
6 1111011 6
7 1101110 5

56 65 1101010 4
67 76 0101110 4
70 07 1101110 5 match 7

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 1110011 5
24 42 1110111 6 match 0
35 53 1111011 6 match 3 6
46 64 1101010 4
57 75 1101110 5 match 7
60 06 1101010 4
71 17 1110100 4

14 41 1110010 4
25 52 1111111 a

47 74 1100110 4

61 16 1111010 5
72 27 0110111 5

37 73 0110111 5
